ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active and available in the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "equivalent_size" TEXT /* Equivalent size in different regions (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_inches" TEXT /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_inches" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_inches" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_inches" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_inches" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_inches" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size chart can be customized by brands */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the brand is active and available in the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_size_charts" (
  "brand_size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being customized */,
  "custom_size_name" TEXT /* Custom size name for the brand */,
  "custom_equivalent_size" TEXT /* Custom equivalent size for the brand */,
  "custom_hip_cm" TEXT /* Custom hip measurement in centimeters for the brand */,
  "custom_hip_inches" TEXT /* Custom hip measurement in inches for the brand */,
  "custom_shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Custom shoulder measurement in centimeters for the brand */,
  "custom_shoulder_inches" TEXT /* Custom shoulder measurement in inches for the brand */,
  "custom_sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Custom sleeve length measurement in centimeters for the brand */,
  "custom_sleeve_length_inches" TEXT /* Custom sleeve length measurement in inches for the brand */,
  "custom_inseam_cm" TEXT /* Custom inseam measurement in centimeters for the brand */,
  "custom_inseam_inches" TEXT /* Custom inseam measurement in inches for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_size_charts_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, pattern maker, production) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's physical address */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size being converted */,
  "equivalent_size" TEXT /* Equivalent size in the target size system */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_inches" TEXT /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_inches" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_inches" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_inches" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_inches" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_inches" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_name FOREIGN KEY ("size_name") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Recommended size name */,
  "equivalent_size" TEXT /* Recommended equivalent size */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest measurement in centimeters for the recommendation */,
  "chest_inches" TEXT /* Chest measurement in inches for the recommendation */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters for the recommendation */,
  "waist_inches" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches for the recommendation */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip measurement in centimeters for the recommendation */,
  "hip_inches" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches for the recommendation */,
  "shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters for the recommendation */,
  "shoulder_inches" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in inches for the recommendation */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters for the recommendation */,
  "sleeve_length_inches" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches for the recommendation */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in centimeters for the recommendation */,
  "inseam_inches" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the measurement belongs to */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_inches" TEXT /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_inches" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_inches" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_inches" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_inches" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_inches" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the log entry belongs to */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was last updated */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
